2269410.name: PROFOUND
2269410.description:
PROFOUND is bound to be the most profound game you will ever play. With a name like PROFOUND how can it NOT? PROFOUND is a action RPG game made by only one person using good ole fashioned unity. The game is set to deliver a fun and unique style of combat to RPG games by taking inspiration from old and new RPG's.

Okay but being HONEST here... This game is kinda crud, I'm ONE developer making my DREAM game. An RPG where you can do just about anything, besides a fulfilling story-line. Let me explain: I'm the type of player that enjoys "old school" games, if you are, you should enjoy this flick. This game isn't ABOUT completing quests or finishing a story, there is NONE. The point is to kill, loot, buy houses, get rich and maybe someday buy a wife. Okay I was joking about that last one, but this game will be driven by player feedback and its very possible it could be an update. This game is a JOKE about the "all games are violent and sexual because they're made by men" mentality. You can ONLY play as a female, with optional light nudity, and ALL quest and shop NPC's are male. This wont change because, 1 I'm too lazy to change it and 2 because its too funny to me at this point.

This game is actually MASSIVE given I'm just one person, with a designer who can't build levels for me. All of the level design, development and programming is done by just me.

Features:

1. Explore anywhere, an open world game world with no clear direction on where to go. Do what you want without risking missing out on a story-line.

2. General silliness, start nude, anime girls are an enemy type

3. Full inventory & equipment system

4. Levels, skills, special abilities

5. Gold, silver, & copper money system

6. Professions like wood cutting, brewing, fishing & cooking

7. Muli-Save system that saves multiple save files locally

8. Quests & quest log system.

9. Navigation system.

10. Horse mounts.
